hooks.command: $dir = Split-Path -Leaf (Get-Location); Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; $icon = [System.Drawing.SystemIcons]::Information; $balloon = New-Object System.Windows.Forms.NotifyIcon; $balloon.Icon = $icon; $balloon.BalloonTipTitle = "[$dir]"; $balloon.BalloonTipText = 'Claude is ready — waiting for you'; $balloon.Visible = $true; $balloon.ShowBalloonTip(5000); Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; $balloon.Dispose()
